title: The Woman with Money and Desire
subtitle: A visualisation of yourself claiming financial authority and personal desire without splitting them
excerpt: A five-minute visualisation for releasing the split between financial power and personal desire. You picture yourself as a woman who holds both, without choosing, without shrinking, without apology.

content.text: A five-minute visualisation. For the woman who holds money, desire, and authority in the same body. At the same time. Without choosing between them.

Picture a room you own or rent: your kitchen, your study, somewhere that is yours. You are in it. You are wearing something you chose because you wanted it, not because it was practical or safe. There is money in your account, a number you've set as the image for this practice. You know it's there.

You are not apologising for the money. You are not softening how you hold yourself in the room. You are not performing warmth to offset the authority. You are simply here: financially whole, physically at ease in yourself, occupying the room the way a person who expects to be in the room does.

Notice what it is like to hold both without splitting them. The money does not require you to be less warm. The desire does not require you to be less serious. The authority does not cost the rest. They sit in the same woman without conflict.
Open your eyes when ready. Note the image that felt most right: the room, the posture, the lack of apology. Write one line about it. That line is the information.
